001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.remote;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
023
024import java.lang.reflect.*;
025import java.util.*;
026
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.rest.common.utils.*;
030
031/**
032 * Holds resolved metadata for an interface annotated with {@link org.apache.juneau.http.remote.Remote @Remote}.
033 *
034 * <p>
035 * Built once per interface class and cached for efficient proxy invocation.
036 * Use {@link #of(Class)} to obtain instances.
037 *
038 * <p>
039 * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack
040 * ({@code org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*}).
041 * It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the <b>next major</b> Juneau release
042 * (and possibly earlier).
043 *
044 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
045 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/NextGenRestClient">juneau-ng REST client</a>
046 * </ul>
047 *
048 * @since 9.2.1
049 */
050public final class RrpcInterfaceMeta {
051
052   private static final Map<Class<?>, RrpcInterfaceMeta> CACHE = new java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap<>();
053
054   private final Class<?> iface;
055   private final String basePath;
056   // Interface-level base/host override: an annotation-declared substitute for the client root URL.
057   private final String baseUrl;
058   // Interface-level content negotiation: default accept + contentType media-type overrides.
059   private final String accept;
060   private final String contentType;
061   private final List<Map.Entry<String,String>> headers;
062   private final List<Map.Entry<String,String>> queryData;
063   private final List<Map.Entry<String,String>> formData;
064   // Interface-level custom part serializer: from @HttpPartMarshalling(serializer=...) on the interface.
065   private final HttpPartSerializer partSerializer;
066   // Interface-level cross-cutting call policy: defaults inherited by every method.
067   private final Class<?>[] interceptorClasses;
068   private final String timeout;
069   private final int retries;
070   private final boolean retryNonIdempotent;
071   private final boolean throwOnError;
072   private final Map<Method, RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta> methodMetas;
073   private final Map<String, RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta> methodMetasByPath;
074
075   private RrpcInterfaceMeta(Class<?> iface) {
076      this(iface, false);
077   }
078
079   /**
080    * Constructor.
081    *
082    * <p>
083    * Provides backwards compatibility with the classic {@code RrpcInterfaceMeta} signature; the {@code uri}
084    * argument is accepted for API parity and is currently ignored by this implementation.
085    *
086    * <p>
087    * Unlike {@link #of(Class)}, this constructor includes <i>all</i> public interface methods (matching the
088    * classic behavior), not just those annotated with the {@code @Remote*} annotations.
089    *
090    * @param iface The interface class. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
091    * @param uri Reserved for compatibility with the classic constructor. May be <jk>null</jk>.
092    */
093   @SuppressWarnings({
094      "java:S1172" // 'uri' is part of the public constructor signature retained for API parity with the classic RrpcInterfaceMeta; intentionally ignored
095   })
096   public RrpcInterfaceMeta(Class<?> iface, String uri) {
097      this(iface, true);
098   }
099
100   private RrpcInterfaceMeta(Class<?> iface, boolean includeUnannotated) {
101      if (!iface.isInterface())
102         throw illegalArg("Class {0} is not an interface", iface.getName());
103      var remote = iface.getAnnotation(Remote.class);
104
105      this.iface = iface;
106      this.basePath = buildBasePath(remote);
107      this.baseUrl = remote == null ? "" : VarResolver.DEFAULT.resolve(remote.baseUrl());
108      this.accept = remote == null ? "" : VarResolver.DEFAULT.resolve(remote.accept());
109      this.contentType = remote == null ? "" : VarResolver.DEFAULT.resolve(remote.contentType());
110      this.headers = buildHeaders(remote);
111      this.queryData = remote == null ? List.of() : parseConstantParts(remote.queryData(), '=');
112      this.formData = remote == null ? List.of() : parseConstantParts(remote.formData(), '=');
113      var hpm = iface.getAnnotation(HttpPartMarshalling.class);
114      this.partSerializer = hpm == null ? null : RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.resolvePartSerializer(hpm.serializer());
115      // Interface-level cross-cutting policy defaults.
116      this.interceptorClasses = remote == null ? new Class<?>[0] : remote.interceptors();
117      this.timeout = remote == null ? "" : remote.timeout();
118      this.retries = remote == null ? 0 : remote.retries();
119      this.retryNonIdempotent = remote != null && remote.retryNonIdempotent();
120      this.throwOnError = remote != null && remote.throwOnError();
121
122      var metas = new LinkedHashMap<Method, RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta>();
123      for (var m : iface.getMethods()) {
124         var opt = buildMethodMeta(m);
125         if (opt.isPresent()) {
126            metas.put(m, opt.get());
127         } else if (includeUnannotated) {
128            metas.put(m, new RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta(m, "POST", buildSignaturePath(m), RemoteReturn.BODY));
129         }
130      }
131      this.methodMetas = Collections.unmodifiableMap(metas);
132
133      var byPath = new LinkedHashMap<String, RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta>();
134      for (var v : metas.values())
135         byPath.put(v.getPath(), v);
136      this.methodMetasByPath = Collections.unmodifiableMap(byPath);
137   }
138
139   private static String buildBasePath(Remote remote) {
140      if (remote == null)
141         return "";
142      return remote.path().isEmpty() ? remote.value() : remote.path();
143   }
144
145   /**
146    * Resolves the interface-level constant headers declared via {@link Remote#headers()} and the client-version
147    * header derived from {@link Remote#version()}/{@link Remote#versionHeader()}.
148    *
149    * <p>
150    * Each {@code headers()} entry is a {@code "Name: value"} string (the colon-separated form), resolved through
151    * {@link VarResolver#DEFAULT} so values such as {@code "$S{sysprop}"} expand.  A non-empty {@code version()}
152    * appends a {@code Client-Version} header (or the name given by {@code versionHeader()}).
153    *
154    * <p>
155    * <b>Note:</b> {@link Remote#headerList()} is intentionally <i>not</i> honored by the next-gen engine — its value
156    * type is a classic {@code org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.HeaderList} subclass that is specific to the
157    * Apache-HttpClient transport.  Use {@code headers()} for transport-agnostic constant headers.
158    */
159   private static List<Map.Entry<String,String>> buildHeaders(Remote remote) {
160      if (remote == null)
161         return List.of();
162      var l = new ArrayList<>(parseConstantParts(remote.headers(), ':'));
163      var version = VarResolver.DEFAULT.resolve(remote.version());
164      if (! version.isEmpty()) {
165         var vh = remote.versionHeader().isEmpty() ? "Client-Version" : VarResolver.DEFAULT.resolve(remote.versionHeader());
166         l.add(Map.entry(vh, version));
167      }
168      return Collections.unmodifiableList(l);
169   }
170
171   /**
172    * Parses an array of constant {@code "name<delim>value"} strings into resolved name/value entries.
173    *
174    * <p>
175    * Each entry is resolved through {@link VarResolver#DEFAULT} (so values such as {@code "$S{sysprop}"} expand), then
176    * split on the first occurrence of {@code delim} ({@code ':'} for the {@code "Name: value"} header form, {@code '='}
177    * for the {@code "name=value"} query/form-data form).  Entries with no delimiter are skipped.  Both the name and the
178    * value are trimmed.
179    *
180    * @param entries The raw annotation strings (may be empty).
181    * @param delim The name/value delimiter character.
182    * @return An unmodifiable list of resolved name/value entries. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
183    */
184   static List<Map.Entry<String,String>> parseConstantParts(String[] entries, char delim) {
185      if (entries.length == 0)
186         return List.of();
187      var l = new ArrayList<Map.Entry<String,String>>();
188      for (var e : entries) {
189         var s = VarResolver.DEFAULT.resolve(e);
190         var i = s.indexOf(delim);
191         if (i != -1)
192            l.add(Map.entry(s.substring(0, i).trim(), s.substring(i + 1).trim()));
193      }
194      return Collections.unmodifiableList(l);
195   }
196
197   private static String buildSignaturePath(Method m) {
198      var sb = new StringBuilder(128);
199      sb.append(m.getName()).append('/');
200      Class<?>[] pt = m.getParameterTypes();
201      if (pt.length == 0)
202         return sb.toString();
203      sb.append('(');
204      for (var i = 0; i < pt.length; i++) {
205         if (i > 0)
206            sb.append(',');
207         appendTypeName(sb, pt[i]);
208      }
209      sb.append(')');
210      return sb.toString();
211   }
212
213   private static void appendTypeName(StringBuilder sb, Class<?> c) {
214      if (c.isArray()) {
215         appendTypeName(sb, c.getComponentType());
216         sb.append("[]");
217      } else {
218         sb.append(c.getName());
219      }
220   }
221
222   /**
223    * Returns the {@link RrpcInterfaceMeta} for the given interface, creating and caching it if necessary.
224    *
225    * @param iface The interface class. Must be annotated with {@link org.apache.juneau.http.remote.Remote}. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
226    * @return The metadata. Never <jk>null</jk>.
227    * @throws IllegalArgumentException If the class is not an interface or not annotated with {@link org.apache.juneau.http.remote.Remote}.
228    */
229   public static RrpcInterfaceMeta of(Class<?> iface) {
230      assertArgNotNull("iface", iface);
231      if (!iface.isInterface())
232         throw illegalArg("Class {0} is not an interface", iface.getName());
233      if (iface.getAnnotation(Remote.class) == null)
234         throw illegalArg("Class {0} is not annotated with @Remote", iface.getName());
235      return CACHE.computeIfAbsent(iface, RrpcInterfaceMeta::new);
236   }
237
238   /**
239    * Returns the interface class.
240    *
241    * @return The interface. Never <jk>null</jk>.
242    */
243   public Class<?> getInterface() {
244      return iface;
245   }
246
247   /**
248    * Returns the Java class of this interface.
249    *
250    * <p>
251    * Alias for {@link #getInterface()} provided for backwards compatibility with the classic API.
252    *
253    * @return The Java class. Never <jk>null</jk>.
254    */
255   public Class<?> getJavaClass() {
256      return getInterface();
257   }
258
259   /**
260    * Returns the method metadata keyed by the resolved method path.
261    *
262    * @return An unmodifiable map from path to {@link RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta}. Never <jk>null</jk>.
263    */
264   public Map<String, RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta> getMethodsByPath() {
265      return methodMetasByPath;
266   }
267
268   /**
269    * Returns the method metadata for the given path.
270    *
271    * @param path The path. May be <jk>null</jk>.
272    * @return The matching method metadata, or <jk>null</jk> if no match was found.
273    */
274   public RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta getMethodMetaByPath(String path) {
275      return path == null ? null : methodMetasByPath.get(path);
276   }
277
278   /**
279    * Returns the base path from the {@link org.apache.juneau.http.remote.Remote#path() Remote} annotation.
280    *
281    * @return The base path. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
282    */
283   public String getBasePath() {
284      return basePath;
285   }
286
287   /**
288    * Returns the interface-level base/host override, or an empty string if none.
289    *
290    * <p>
291    * Sourced from {@link Remote#baseUrl()} (resolved through {@link VarResolver#DEFAULT}).  Used as a substitute for
292    * the client root URL when neither an {@link org.apache.juneau.http.Url @Url} parameter nor a method-level
293    * {@code baseUrl} is in effect; preserves the interface base path + method path + templating.
294    *
295    * @return The base/host override. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
296    */
297   public String getBaseUrl() {
298      return baseUrl;
299   }
300
301   /**
302    * Returns the interface-level default {@code contentType} media-type override, or an empty string.
303    *
304    * <p>
305    * Sourced from {@link Remote#contentType()} (resolved through {@link VarResolver#DEFAULT}).  Used as the default
306    * request-serializer/{@code Content-Type} selector for methods that declare no method-level
307    * {@link RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta#getContentType()}.
308    *
309    * @return The {@code contentType} media type. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
310    */
311   public String getContentType() {
312      return contentType;
313   }
314
315   /**
316    * Returns the interface-level default {@code accept} media-type override, or an empty string.
317    *
318    * <p>
319    * Sourced from {@link Remote#accept()} (resolved through {@link VarResolver#DEFAULT}).  Used as the default
320    * {@code Accept} header / response-parser fallback for methods that declare no method-level
321    * {@link RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta#getAccept()}.
322    *
323    * @return The {@code accept} media type. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
324    */
325   public String getAccept() {
326      return accept;
327   }
328
329   /**
330    * Returns the interface-level constant headers to set on every request.
331    *
332    * <p>
333    * Includes the headers declared via {@link Remote#headers()} plus the client-version header derived from
334    * {@link Remote#version()}/{@link Remote#versionHeader()} (if a version was specified).
335    *
336    * @return An unmodifiable list of name/value header entries. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
337    */
338   public List<Map.Entry<String,String>> getHeaders() {
339      return headers;
340   }
341
342   /**
343    * Returns the interface-level constant query parameters to apply to every request.
344    *
345    * <p>
346    * Resolved from {@link Remote#queryData()} (the {@code "name=value"} form, with {@link VarResolver#DEFAULT}
347    * expansion).
348    *
349    * @return An unmodifiable list of name/value query entries. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
350    */
351   public List<Map.Entry<String,String>> getQueryData() {
352      return queryData;
353   }
354
355   /**
356    * Returns the interface-level constant form-data parameters to apply to every request.
357    *
358    * <p>
359    * Resolved from {@link Remote#formData()} (the {@code "name=value"} form, with {@link VarResolver#DEFAULT}
360    * expansion).
361    *
362    * @return An unmodifiable list of name/value form-data entries. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
363    */
364   public List<Map.Entry<String,String>> getFormData() {
365      return formData;
366   }
367
368   /**
369    * Returns the interface-level custom {@link HttpPartSerializer}, or <jk>null</jk> if none.
370    *
371    * <p>
372    * Sourced from {@code @HttpPartMarshalling(serializer=...)} declared on the interface.  Used as
373    * the lowest-precedence default for part serialization: a parameter-level or method-level
374    * {@code @HttpPartMarshalling} serializer takes precedence over it.
375    *
376    * @return The resolved part serializer, or <jk>null</jk>.
377    */
378   public HttpPartSerializer getPartSerializer() {
379      return partSerializer;
380   }
381
382   /**
383    * Returns the interface-level interceptor classes, or an empty array if none.
384    *
385    * <p>
386    * Each class implements the next-gen client-side interceptor SPI and is resolved to an instance by the next-gen
387    * {@code RemoteClient} (the raw {@code Class<?>[]} type avoids a module dependency on {@code juneau-rest-client}).
388    *
389    * @return The interceptor classes. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
390    */
391   public Class<?>[] getInterceptorClasses() {
392      return interceptorClasses;
393   }
394
395   /**
396    * Returns the interface-level default per-call timeout as a duration string, or an empty string.
397    *
398    * @return The timeout duration string. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
399    */
400   public String getTimeout() {
401      return timeout;
402   }
403
404   /**
405    * Returns the interface-level default max retry attempts, or {@code 0} if retries are disabled.
406    *
407    * @return The retry count.
408    */
409   public int getRetries() {
410      return retries;
411   }
412
413   /**
414    * Returns whether the interface opts non-idempotent verbs (POST/PATCH) into automatic retries.
415    *
416    * @return <jk>true</jk> if non-idempotent retries are opted in at the interface level.
417    */
418   public boolean isRetryNonIdempotent() {
419      return retryNonIdempotent;
420   }
421
422   /**
423    * Returns whether the interface throws a generic exception on an unmatched error response.
424    *
425    * @return <jk>true</jk> if {@code throwOnError} is set at the interface level.
426    */
427   public boolean isThrowOnError() {
428      return throwOnError;
429   }
430
431   /**
432    * Returns the method metadata for all annotated methods.
433    *
434    * @return An unmodifiable map from {@link Method} to {@link RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta}. Never <jk>null</jk>.
435    */
436   public Map<Method, RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta> getMethodMetas() {
437      return methodMetas;
438   }
439
440   /**
441    * Returns the metadata for the given method, or {@code null} if the method has no remote annotation.
442    *
443    * @param method The method. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
444    * @return The metadata, or <jk>null</jk>.
445    */
446   public RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta getMethodMeta(Method method) {
447      return methodMetas.get(method);
448   }
449
450   @SuppressWarnings({
451      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity inherent to per-verb interface-metadata parsing; refactoring would reduce readability without benefit.
452   })
453   private static Optional<RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta> buildMethodMeta(Method m) {
454      if (m.isAnnotationPresent(RemoteGet.class)) {
455         var a = m.getAnnotation(RemoteGet.class);
456         return opt(simpleMeta(m, "GET", a.path(), a.value(), a.returns(), a.headers(), a.queryData(), a.formData(), a.baseUrl(),
457            new RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.Policy(a.interceptors(), a.timeout(), a.retries(), a.retryNonIdempotent(), a.throwOnError()),
458            neg(a.accept(), a.contentType())));
459      }
460      if (m.isAnnotationPresent(RemotePost.class)) {
461         var a = m.getAnnotation(RemotePost.class);
462         return opt(simpleMeta(m, "POST", a.path(), a.value(), a.returns(), a.headers(), a.queryData(), a.formData(), a.baseUrl(),
463            new RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.Policy(a.interceptors(), a.timeout(), a.retries(), a.retryNonIdempotent(), a.throwOnError()),
464            neg(a.accept(), a.contentType())));
465      }
466      if (m.isAnnotationPresent(RemotePut.class)) {
467         var a = m.getAnnotation(RemotePut.class);
468         return opt(simpleMeta(m, "PUT", a.path(), a.value(), a.returns(), a.headers(), a.queryData(), a.formData(), a.baseUrl(),
469            new RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.Policy(a.interceptors(), a.timeout(), a.retries(), a.retryNonIdempotent(), a.throwOnError()),
470            neg(a.accept(), a.contentType())));
471      }
472      if (m.isAnnotationPresent(RemotePatch.class)) {
473         var a = m.getAnnotation(RemotePatch.class);
474         return opt(simpleMeta(m, "PATCH", a.path(), a.value(), a.returns(), a.headers(), a.queryData(), a.formData(), a.baseUrl(),
475            new RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.Policy(a.interceptors(), a.timeout(), a.retries(), a.retryNonIdempotent(), a.throwOnError()),
476            neg(a.accept(), a.contentType())));
477      }
478      if (m.isAnnotationPresent(RemoteDelete.class)) {
479         var a = m.getAnnotation(RemoteDelete.class);
480         return opt(simpleMeta(m, "DELETE", a.path(), a.value(), a.returns(), a.headers(), a.queryData(), a.formData(), a.baseUrl(),
481            new RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.Policy(a.interceptors(), a.timeout(), a.retries(), a.retryNonIdempotent(), a.throwOnError()),
482            neg(a.accept(), a.contentType())));
483      }
484      if (m.isAnnotationPresent(RemoteOp.class))
485         return opt(buildRemoteOpMeta(m, m.getAnnotation(RemoteOp.class)));
486
487      return opte();
488   }
489
490   /**
491    * Builds a resolved {@link RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.ContentNegotiation} carrier from the raw
492    * {@code accept}/{@code contentType} annotation members, expanding {@link VarResolver#DEFAULT} variables.
493    */
494   private static RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.ContentNegotiation neg(String accept, String contentType) {
495      return new RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.ContentNegotiation(VarResolver.DEFAULT.resolve(accept), VarResolver.DEFAULT.resolve(contentType));
496   }
497
498   @SuppressWarnings({
499      "java:S107" // The 11 parameters mirror the verb-annotation surface (verb/path/value/return + the 3 constant-part arrays + the baseUrl override + the cross-cutting policy carrier + the content-negotiation carrier) threaded into the method-meta; holder types would add indirection without improving this internal builder.
500   })
501   private static RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta simpleMeta(Method m, String httpMethod, String pathAttr, String valueAttr, RemoteReturn returnType, String[] headers, String[] queryData, String[] formData, String baseUrl, RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.Policy policy, RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.ContentNegotiation neg) {
502      var path = pathAttr.isEmpty() ? valueAttr : pathAttr;
503      return new RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta(m, httpMethod, path, returnType,
504         parseConstantParts(headers, ':'),
505         parseConstantParts(queryData, '='),
506         parseConstantParts(formData, '='),
507         VarResolver.DEFAULT.resolve(baseUrl),
508         policy,
509         neg);
510   }
511
512   private static RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta buildRemoteOpMeta(Method m, RemoteOp a) {
513      var method = a.method().trim();
514      var path = a.path().trim();
515      var returnType = a.returns();
516      var v = a.value().trim();
517      if (!v.isEmpty()) {
518         var i = v.indexOf(' ');
519         if (i == -1) {
520            method = v.toUpperCase();
521         } else {
522            method = v.substring(0, i).trim().toUpperCase();
523            path = v.substring(i).trim();
524         }
525      }
526      if (path.isEmpty())
527         path = HttpUtils.detectHttpPath(m, isEmpty(method) ? null : method);
528      if (method.isEmpty())
529         method = HttpUtils.detectHttpMethod(m, true, "GET");
530      if (!isOneOf(method, "DELETE", "GET", "POST", "PUT", "OPTIONS", "HEAD", "CONNECT", "TRACE", "PATCH"))
531         throw illegalArg("Invalid @RemoteOp method ''{0}'' on {1}.{2}", method, m.getDeclaringClass().getName(), m.getName());
532      return new RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta(m, method, trimSlashes(path), returnType,
533         parseConstantParts(a.headers(), ':'),
534         parseConstantParts(a.queryData(), '='),
535         parseConstantParts(a.formData(), '='),
536         VarResolver.DEFAULT.resolve(a.baseUrl()),
537         new RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.Policy(a.interceptors(), a.timeout(), a.retries(), a.retryNonIdempotent(), a.throwOnError()),
538         neg(a.accept(), a.contentType()));
539   }
540
541   @Override /* Object */
542   public String toString() {
543      return "@Remote " + iface.getSimpleName() + " (basePath=" + basePath + ", methods=" + methodMetas.size() + ")";
544   }
545}
